violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Two Dakota Tom’s chicken salad croissants were dated to be discarded 2/16/26. These sandwiches were still in the display cooler to be sold.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system and filters over the fryers needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. White foam containers and clear plastic containers on the shelf by the reach in cooler were not inverted, or covered. Small pizza boxes under the microwave were not inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The wall behind the baking pan storage shelf on the West wall needs to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop was being stored in an empty mop bucket in the electrical room.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
